name: v0.2 adversarial: late-onset optionality loss (O=3) after calm baseline
description: Test vector derived from Claude field report: after a calm baseline, optionality loss spikes (O=3). This is meant to pressure-test whether escalation/repair is too gentle in late-onset coercion patterns. Use with examples/coordcard-v0.2-example.json.

notes: This vector isolates O=3 as a late-onset event after low drift.
Current TS logic treats any component=3 as an immediate repair/escalation trigger.
If maintainers later add a card-level severity dial (component dominance), this fixture should be re-run to confirm behavior remains deterministic and traceable.
